gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes.

alert.text: This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section1.title: 1) Create your account
section1.prefsStart: In the app, open Settings to set your preferences

section2.title: 2) Start messaging
section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Go further

whyMessaging.title: Mun kosɔn Messaging Platkosɔnms Matter Wɛrɛ Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platkosɔnms have become one ka most important minɛnw kosɔn kumakan kɔnɔ bi’s world. Ka bɔ yɛrɛ ta barow ka taa baara interactions, messaging aplikeesɔns bɛɛow people ka taa stay connected instantly ani efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely kan messaging aplikeesɔns kosɔn daily kumakan ni teris, somɔgɔw, ani colleagues. Whether it's quick update walima long baro, messaging provides convenient ani flexible way ka taa stay kɔnɔ touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One ka main advantages ka messaging platkosɔnms ye their speed. Mesajw ye delivered instantly, bɛɛowing baarakɛlaw ka taa communicate kɔnɔ real time. Nin level ka convenience has made messaging preferred method ka kumakan kosɔn mdɔ o dɔ people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platkosɔnms connect people across globe. Ni internet access, baarakɛlaw bɛ se ka communicate regarddɔgɔman ka location, making it easier ka taa build relationships ani collaborate internationbɛɛy.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platkosɔnms focus kan giving baarakɛlaw jɔyɔrɔ over their data ani barow. Fɛn nafamaw like gundolali, gundoya labɛnw, ani mesaj jɔyɔrɔs bɛɛow baarakɛlaw ka taa communicate ni confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues ka taa evolve ni kura fɛn nafamaw such as AI-poanred responses, bamanankan na bɔli, ani multimedia tilali. As techayilogy advances, messaging platkosɔnms bɛ na become even wɛrɛ poanrful ani versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatkosɔnia ye built ni ninw principles kɔnɔ mind, offering fast, lakanalen, ani baarakɛla-terily messaging experience kosɔn connected world.

global.title: Sinikɛnɛ ka Duniya bɛɛ Kumakan
global.intro: Kumakan has evolved rapidly over past few decades. Mun once ka kan phone anleliw walima in-person meetings bɛ se ka sisan kɛ done teliya la fɛ messaging platkosɔnms. As techayilogy continues ka taa advance, duniya bɛɛ kumakan ye becoming faster, wɛrɛ accessible, ani wɛrɛ inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One ka biggest yɛlɛmaw kɔnɔ kumakan ye reduction ka geographic barriers. People bɛ se ka sisan connect ni wɛrɛs across world kɔnɔ near real time. Whether kosɔn yɛrɛ ta barow, baara, walima collaboration, messaging platkosɔnms have made distance far dɔgɔman limiting.
global.translationTitle: Role ka Bamanankan na bɔli Techayilogy
global.translationDesc: Kan has traditionbɛɛy been one ka biggest obstacles ka taa duniya bɛɛ kumakan. Bi, built-in bamanankan na bɔli minɛnw help bridge o gap. Platkosɔnms like Chatkosɔnia bɛɛow baarakɛlaw ka taa communicate wɛrɛ nɔgɔya la even ni they speak different kans, creating kura opportunities kosɔn connection ani understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed ye key factor shaping modern kumakan. Baarakɛlaw expect mesajw ka taa kɛ delivered teliya la, ani modern infrastructure dɛmɛs o expectation. Real-time messaging kɛs wɛrɛ natural ani fluid barow.
global.privacyDesc: As kumakan becomes wɛrɛ digital, gundoya ani lakanali ye increasingly important. Baarakɛlaw want confidence o their barow ye protected. Fɛn nafamaw like gundolali ani baarakɛla-jɔyɔrɔled labɛnw help dɛmɛ wɛrɛ lakanalen kumakan experience.
global.futureDesc: sinikɛnɛ ka duniya bɛɛ kumakan bɛ na likely include wɛrɛ advanced minɛnw, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved bamanankan na bɔli, ani enhanced baarakɛla experiences. As techayilogy evolves, kumakan bɛ na continue ka taa become wɛrɛ intuitive ani accessible.
global.outro: Platkosɔnms like Chatkosɔnia ye part ka nin shift, helping people connect wɛrɛ nɔgɔya la across kans ani borders.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.
